TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == bahbah == 驅逐,趕走 siwkay nu bahbah nu mapalaway a kamu, mibahbah sa, mipaliyas tu tademaw saca aadupan saca dietu... tinaku a kamu bahbahan 被趕走了 / bahbahan nu pikadabuan ci Kaying. bahbahen 趕走 / bahbahen nu ama ci Kacaw! mabahbah 被趕 / mabahbah nu acawa ci Tubah kiyu milakalak i Pusung. mibahbah 驅趕 / mibahbah tu palabuway. pibahbahi 趕走 / pibahbahi tu nani' i paluday! u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika 驅逐 ​,祭師行為時的用語. mibahbah tu da'cusay a di'tu, u kamu nu kawaw nu mapalaway. .mibahbah tu de'cusay a tademaw namakay kakitizaan asaca kantal, naizawtu nay sumamaday. to drive out , referring usually to evil spirits. Deportation is the expulsion of a person or group of people from a place or country. The term expulsion is often used as a synonym for deportation, through expulsion is more often used in the context of international law, while deportation is more used in national law.
S.PHON: == baħbaħ == **,** siwkaj nu baħbaħ nu mapar~ɾawaj a kamu, mibaħbaħ sa, mipar~ɾijas tu tadəmaw saʦa aadupan saʦa diətu... tinaku a kamu baħbaħan **** / baħbaħan nu pikadabuan ʦi kajiŋ. baħbaħən ** / baħbaħən nu ama ʦi kaʦaw! mabaħbaħ ** / mabaħbaħ nu aʦawa ʦi tubaħ kiju mir~ɾakar~ɾak i pusuŋ. mibaħbaħ ** / mibaħbaħ tu par~ɾabuwaj. pibaħbaħi ** / pibaħbaħi tu naniʔ~ʡ i par~ɾudaj! u sur~ɾit nu ħur~ɾam atu amir~ɾika ** *,********. mibaħbaħ tu daʔ~ʡʦusaj a diʔ~ʡtu, u kamu nu kawaw nu mapar~ɾawaj. .mibaħbaħ tu dəʔ~ʡʦusaj a tadəmaw namakaj kakitizaan asaʦa kantar~ɾ, naizawtu naj sumamadaj. to dri*ə out , rəfərriŋ usuar~ɾr~ɾj to ə*ir~ɾ spirits. dəportation is tħə ə*pur~ɾsion of a pərson or group of pəopr~ɾə from a pr~ɾaʦə or ʦountrj. tħə tərm ə*pur~ɾsion is oftən usəd as a sjnonjm for dəportation, tħrougħ ə*pur~ɾsion is morə oftən usəd in tħə ʦontə*t of intərnationar~ɾ r~ɾaw, wħir~ɾə dəportation is morə usəd in nationar~ɾ r~ɾaw.
S.FORM: == bahbah == 驅逐,趕走 siwkay nu bahbah nu mapalaway a kamu, mibahbah sa, mipaliyas tu tademaw saca aadupan saca dietu... tinaku a kamu bahbahan 被趕走了 / bahbahan nu pikadabuan ci Kaying. bahbahen 趕走 / bahbahen nu ama ci Kacaw! mabahbah 被趕 / mabahbah nu acawa ci Tubah kiyu milakalak i Pusung. mibahbah 驅趕 / mibahbah tu palabuway. pibahbahi 趕走 / pibahbahi tu nani' i paluday! u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika 驅逐 ​,祭師行為時的用語. mibahbah tu da'cusay a di'tu, u kamu nu kawaw nu mapalaway. .mibahbah tu de'cusay a tademaw namakay kakitizaan asaca kantal, naizawtu nay sumamaday. to drive out , referring usually to evil spirits. Deportation is the expulsion of a person or group of people from a place or country. The term expulsion is often used as a synonym for deportation, through expulsion is more often used in the context of international law, while deportation is more used in national law.
S.PHON: == baħbaħ == **,** siwkaj nu baħbaħ nu mapar~ɾawaj a kamu, mibaħbaħ sa, mipar~ɾijas tu tadəmaw saʦa aadupan saʦa diətu... tinaku a kamu baħbaħan **** / baħbaħan nu pikadabuan ʦi kajiŋ. baħbaħən ** / baħbaħən nu ama ʦi kaʦaw! mabaħbaħ ** / mabaħbaħ nu aʦawa ʦi tubaħ kiju mir~ɾakar~ɾak i pusuŋ. mibaħbaħ ** / mibaħbaħ tu par~ɾabuwaj. pibaħbaħi ** / pibaħbaħi tu naniʔ~ʡ i par~ɾudaj! u sur~ɾit nu ħur~ɾam atu amir~ɾika ** *,********. mibaħbaħ tu daʔ~ʡʦusaj a diʔ~ʡtu, u kamu nu kawaw nu mapar~ɾawaj. .mibaħbaħ tu dəʔ~ʡʦusaj a tadəmaw namakaj kakitizaan asaʦa kantar~ɾ, naizawtu naj sumamadaj. to dri*ə out , rəfərriŋ usuar~ɾr~ɾj to ə*ir~ɾ spirits. dəportation is tħə ə*pur~ɾsion of a pərson or group of pəopr~ɾə from a pr~ɾaʦə or ʦountrj. tħə tərm ə*pur~ɾsion is oftən usəd as a sjnonjm for dəportation, tħrougħ ə*pur~ɾsion is morə oftən usəd in tħə ʦontə*t of intərnationar~ɾ r~ɾaw, wħir~ɾə dəportation is morə usəd in nationar~ɾ r~ɾaw.
